# WASP-17b transmission spectrum 
# This file contains:
# STIS G430L - GO 12473 - Sing et al. 2016, Nature
# STIS G750L - GO 12473 - Sing et al. 2016, Nature
# WFC3 G141 - GO 12181 - Mandel, et al., 2013, ApJ
# Spitzer 3.6 & 4.5 - Sing et al. 2016, Nature
# Data history:
# Presented in full in Sing et al. 2016, Nature with new WFC3 reduction
# Converted from: http://www.astro.ex.ac.uk/people/sing/David_Sing/Spectral_Library.html
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Wavelength (microns)  Delta Wavelength (microns)  (Rp/Rs)^2   (Rp/Rs)^2 +/-uncertainty
